prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Honda RA616H 1.6L V6 turbocharged hybrid power unit (engine code: RA616H)** with a **Garrett GT35R turbocharger** (custom billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer, 76mm exducer) paired with a **Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rod set** (H-beam, 143.75mm length, 4340 steel) to handle 550+ hp at 15,000 RPM while maintaining FIA-mandated fuel flow limits (100kg/hr).

Install a **McLaren Applied Technologies TAG-400 ECU** with a **Motec M150** piggyback for real-time torque vectoring adjustments, integrating **Bosch MS25.1 direct injectors** (1200cc flow rate) and a **Mahle Motorsport forged piston set** (9.0:1 compression, 53mm wrist pin diameter) to optimize combustion efficiency under 500 bar fuel pressure.

Replace the stock **Mercedes-AMG F1 W07 Hybrid MGU-K** with a **Magneti Marelli MGU-K 2017 spec** (200kW output, 50,000 RPM max) and pair it with a **Williams Advanced Engineering lithium-ion battery pack** (1.1kWh, 4MJ energy storage) to enhance energy recovery under braking (up to 4G deceleration) and deployment during acceleration (0-100 km/h in 2.1s).
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS MP4-31 widebody kit** (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and diffuser extensions) with **APR Performance GT-300 carbon fiber rear wing** (3D-printed titanium endplates, 1.2m span, 30mm Gurney flap) for downforce optimization at 320 km/h (1,200kg total load).

Install **OMP Racing KS-8RR carbon fiber steering wheel** (F1-spec, 270mm diameter, Alcantara grip) with **McLaren F1-style LED shift lights** and a **Sparco 6-point harness** (HANS-compatible, FIA 8853/2016 certified) for driver ergonomics and safety under lateral G-forces exceeding 5G.

Apply a **3M Scotchcal 950 Premium Wrapping Film** in **McLaren Papaya Spark** with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** carbon fiber accents (front splitter, side skirts, and mirror caps) paired with **HRE P101SC forged wheels** (13x18 front, 16x18 rear, 3-piece construction, titanium fasteners) and **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (265/35 R18 front, 325/30 R18 rear).
